options.systemMessage: You are a sprint estimation assistant. Output only a single valid JSON object with keys: number, title, labels, estimate (Fibonacci integer), rationale. No markdown fences, no extra text.

assignments.name: priorityNotes
assignments.value: High priority: Fix navigation accessibility bug. High priority: Add dark mode support. Medium priority: Update storybook docs. Medium priority: Improve button component API. Low priority: Refactor internal CSS variables. Low priority: Add unit tests for form components.

options.systemMessage: You are a sprint planning assistant. Output only a single valid JSON object with keys: high, medium, low — each an array of strings. No markdown fences.

parameters.text:
=You are an engineering manager creating a sprint plan.

## Estimated Issues
{{ JSON.stringify($json.estimates, null, 2) }}

## Priority Rankings
{{ JSON.stringify($json.priorities, null, 2) }}

## Team Skills (1-5 per skill, speed 1-5, availability: full/partial/limited)
{{ JSON.stringify($json.teamSkills, null, 2) }}

Create a sprint plan:
- Assign each issue to the best team member (skill match + speed + availability)
- Capacity: full=13pts, partial=8pts, limited=5pts
- Prioritize high items first, defer what doesn't fit

Output structured Markdown with:
## Sprint Goal
## Assignments
| Member | Issue # | Title | Estimate | Rationale |
## Points Summary
| Member | Assigned | Capacity | Status |
## Deferred Issues
| Issue # | Title | Estimate | Reason |
## Sprint Notes

options.systemMessage: You are a sprint planning assistant. Output clean Markdown only. No JSON, no code fences around the Markdown.
